items.title: Tourist hotspot at 'end of the world' denies causing hantavirus outbreak
items.dek: The BBC visits the city of Ushuaia, where heath officials have been sent to investigate the origins of the outbreak.

items.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body
items.dek: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.
items.body: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.
